# Size

**Data field**

A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in the track exclude from autoselection atom.

## Overview

This must be `8`, as this atom must contain no data.

## Data fields

- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.

items.description: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
